ministers.name: Foremole
ministers.description: Reveal any card to place a citadel or market in any clearing (matching or not) you rule.

ministers.name: Banker
ministers.description: Spend any number of cards (even one) of the same suit to score victory points in equal number.

ministers.name: Brigadier
ministers.description: Take up to two moves or initiate up to two battles.

ministers.name: Mayor
ministers.description: Take the action of any swayed noble or squire.

ministers.name: Duchess of Mud
ministers.description: Score two victory points if all three tunnels are on the map.
ministers.action_description: Gain points if all tunnels on map.

ministers.name: Earl of Stone
ministers.description: Score one victory point per citadel on the map.

ministers.name: Baron of Dirt
ministers.description: Score one victory point per market on the map.
